name: Octobat
description: Octobat — Automated tax compliance, invoicing and VAT accounting for digital businesses

seo.title: Octobat — Invoicing / Taxes / Sales Tax
seo.meta_description: Octobat: Octobat — Automated tax compliance, invoicing and VAT accounting for digital businesses

when_to_use: Generating EU VAT-compliant invoices for digital services
Automating VAT OSS reporting for EU cross-border B2C sales
Reconciling Stripe/Paddle payments with tax invoice records

pros: Automated tax-compliant invoicing for digital goods
Handles EU VAT MOSS and global rules
Clean API for invoice and credit note issuance
cons: Narrower scope than full tax engines
review.verdict: Niche but useful for Stripe-based SaaS needing compliant EU invoices — check roadmap before betting big.
review.best_for: Digital businesses on Stripe needing compliant VAT invoices without building logic themselves.
review.not_for: Teams needing cutting-edge global tax determination or heavy product investment.

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: No explicit peak-lock evidence; default FALSE per rules.
